遊戲標題: Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition

遊戲敘述: 有史以來最受歡迎的戰略遊戲之一迎來 20 週年，為此我們推出了《Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition》。本作擁有驚人的 4K 超高畫質，全面重製的新原聲音樂，以及內含 3 個新戰役和 4 個新文明的內容：《最後的可汗》。常態更新項目包括活動、新增內容、新遊戲模式，以及隨近期上線的合作模式所帶來的增強功能！

announcement_body.headline: Watch Hidden Cup V Now!
announcement_body.body:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/35210618/01d41c3d5295dc8c0454359e6935e4b245964fca.png[/img]
Hidden Cup V is an [i]Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition[/i] tournament hosted by T90Official. Hidden Cup showcases the best players in the world - and no one knows who they are! Players play with the names of in-game Hero units, mostly named after historical figures from the campaigns, but with a few clever exceptions.

The bracket for the main event is completely random and the maps are INSANE! Be sure to check it out and play a role in [i]Age of Empires[/i] history! Hidden Cup V will be streamed live on T90Official’s Twitch and YouTube, [b]February 25th through March 3rd[/b]. Go cheer on your favorite hero, try to guess your favorite player, and most importantly enjoy some epic [i]Age of Empires II[/i] games!

[table noborder=1][tr][td][url=https://www.twitch.tv/t90official][img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/35210618/a1b8691a6b8e415fe53507c35761fca191e93a36.png[/img][/url][/td][td][url=https://www.youtube.com/t90official][img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/35210618/9ae6343f59e2c17509f6150ed11aa9695f0fa894.png[/img][/url][/td][/tr][/table]
[h2]Looking for more? [/h2]

Check out the Hidden Cup V Hero Showdown! If you ever wondered which units would win in a head-to-head battle, look no further!

[previewyoutube=qyBXcy_QQ5g;full][/previewyoutube]

announcement_body.headline: Don't Miss Out: New Year, New Age Sale Still Going On!
announcement_body.body:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/40285313/305607384a313414a12bff01597f6abd0f2c74fc.jpg[/img]
Only a few more hours left for the New Year, New Age Sale on Steam - there's no better time to complete your collection. From [b]now until February 29th at 10am PT[/b], almost everything in the [i]Age of Empires[/i] catalogue is up to 50% off. Go on, treat yourself.

announcement_body.headline: Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition – Update 104954
announcement_body.body:
[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/35210618/9977eafe0cf0161642a1283c42219f0d2b0b58cd.jpg[/img]
Today’s small update is aimed at addressing several pressing issues.

Be sure to dig down into the post below to get all of the smaller details before hopping in-game and checking them out firsthand.

[quote]💬 [b]DISCUSS:[/b] [url=https://forums.ageofempires.com/c/age-of-empires-ii/] Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition Forum[/url]
🗣 [b]JOIN:[/b] [url=https://discord.gg/ageofempires] The Age of Empires Official Discord[/url][/quote]
Thanks again to our amazing community members, all of whom have helped to make [i]Age of Empires[/i] what it is today!

—The [i]Age of Empires[/i] Team

[hr][/hr][code][h1]        ◆ UPDATE 104954 ◆[/h1][/code][hr][/hr][quote][h2]Game[/h2]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/35210618/1db5c65a88bbfe0c20e6ed2d39eb75f446dc5dc4.png[/img]
[h3]Xbox[/h3]
[list][*] Gurjaras can now upgrade to Elite Shirvamsha Riders, as intended, through the radial menu with a controller.
[*] Bengalis can now upgrade to Siege Elephants as intended, through the radial menu with a controller.[/list]
[/quote]
[quote]
[h2]Gameplay[/h2]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/35210618/f01db334b35fb1ed5d41ae3a06734068b5fb90f1.png[/img]
[h3]General[/h3]
[list][*] Fixed an issue with units prioritizing farms over other units/buildings when retargeting.
[*] Fixed an issue with units on stand ground not always automatically attacking units within their range. Units will now correctly retarget units within range without a direct order.[/list]
[/quote]
[quote]
[h2]AI[/h2]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/35210618/37db36919e90536e12792205c9a2bc480b6b51eb.png[/img]
[h3]Pathfinding[/h3]
[list][*] Fixed an issue with units regrouping after being issued a movement command.
[*] Fixed an issue with units teleporting.
[*] Fixed an issue with Villagers getting stuck in a loop trying to reach a resource to gather from.[/list]
[/quote]
[quote]
[h2]Known Issues[/h2]

[img]{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/35210618/caa99c8a5cbf0e5f35516859a6a3a1089c41195f.png[/img]
[list][*] [b]AI:[/b] Units on the stand ground attack stance defend themselves if they can’t path find to a targeted unit. To override this behavior, Ctrl+Rightclick can be used on the target (no matter the attack stance).
[*] [b]Gameplay:[/b] In some cases, defensive buildings firing multiple arrows can output more damage than intended.[/list]As always, we are continuing to track issues reported by the community for future updates.

For other known issues, please visit [url=https://support.ageofempires.com/hc/articles/360049490811]this page[/url] to see what’s being tracked!
[/quote]
[quote][h3]:alertalert: [b]DISCLAIMER[/b][/h3]This list is subject to change and should not be considered a comprehensive list of all the known issues we’re tracking. The above is to inform you of the team’s current priorities, which will change as other issues arise or take precedence.

For the latest updates and announcements, please visit our [url=https://twitter.com/ageofempires]social channels[/url].
[/quote]

123,512 篇使用者評論中有 94% 給予此遊戲好評。

有史以來最受歡迎的戰略遊戲之一迎來 20 週年，為此我們推出了《Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition》。本作擁有驚人的 4K 超高畫質，全面重製的新原聲音樂，以及內含 3 個新戰役和 4 個新文明的內容：《最後的可汗》。常態更新項目包括活動、新增內容、新遊戲模式，以及隨近期上線的合作模式所帶來的增強功能！
